default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SEO audit processes, content strategy approaches, and explore potential AI-assisted keyword research improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO audits should focus on page speed metrics and competitor benchmarking rather than fixating on all flagged issues](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [Content strategy requires manual research and critical thinking; no "magic bullet" exists for comprehensive topical analysis](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [The team sees potential in leveraging AI (e.g., Ahrefs MCP) to streamline keyword research and content gap analysis processes](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)

## Topics

### SEO Audit Best Practices

  - [Jakub prefers Ahrefs over SEMrush for technical SEO audits due to more comprehensive data](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - Focus on page speed metrics (e.g., First Contentful Paint \< 2 seconds) as they correlate with conversion rates and SEO performance
  - [Common issues affecting page speed: excessive JavaScript, unnecessary tags, and uncompressed images](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Benchmark against competitors' page speeds to determine improvement priorities](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)

### Content Strategy Approaches

  - [Avoid blindly copying competitors' content strategies, as they may not be effective](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Utilize Google site: operator to find relevant content within a specific domain](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Explore niche SaaS companies in the target industry for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [Analyze backlink anchor text to discover relevant product/service synonyms and categories](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Consider using AI to analyze internal linking structures for optimization insights](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)

### AI-Assisted Keyword Research

  - [Team expressed interest in leveraging Ahrefs MCP (Machine Learning, Crawling, and Processing) server for more efficient keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Potential to combine AI analysis with platform data for faster, more insightful topic generation](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Further exploration needed to determine feasibility and cost-effectiveness of implementation](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

### Client-Specific Discussions

  - [DeepGram: Requested focus on speech-to-text API content, particularly for pharmacy and QSR (drive-thru) industries](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Interwell: Identified broken internal links, presenting an opportunity to improve site health score](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Folsom: Improved site health score from 50 to 85 by addressing flagged issues](https://fathom.video/share/5CK_APNziCwXQxCPnByRvDERS_rhBhsB?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

## Next Steps
